title: euphrasia collina subsp. deflexifolia
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. deflexifolia, also known as the Alpine Eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, native to the alpine regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia collina subsp. deflexifolia include relieving conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Euphrasia collina subsp. deflexifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from a range of health conditions.
